curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The fix replaces dangerouslySetInnerHTML with a new SafeHTML component (backed by DOMPurify) in ViewMessagesDialog.jsx, ChatMessage.jsx, and NodeExecutionDetails.jsx, and refactors JsonViewer.jsx to use React elements instead of innerHTML for JSON syntax highlighting. All four pre-existing source files contained the same unsafe HTML rendering pattern. Noisy because 4 existing source files were modified plus a new SafeHTML component was added.
